original_question:
Define $M-N=\{x|x\in M \text{ and } x\notin N\}$. If $M=\{1,3,5,7,9\}$ and $N=\{2,3,5\}$, then $M-N=$ \_\_\_\_\_\_.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
